title: 4PCS Quick Grip Clamps, 50x300mm Woodworking F Clamps, Ratchet Bar Quick Release One Handed Clamping Tool for Woodwork, Handmade Craft, DIY, Clamping
features: 【Woodworking Tool】This set of heavy duty F clamps are characterized by a large clamping distance and effortless saving, a practical hand tool for woodworking, widely used in gluing and splicing wood to clamp and fix wood

【Deep Screw Thread for Firm Fixed】The screw of this F wood clamps has a deep thread, which can ensure the gear won’t loose once it is fixed, and it can also increase the slid time and serving life of this clamp

【Soft Cover for Protection】There are 2 soft plastic cover on the teeth of this wood grip clamps, which will well prevent the wood from damaging by too much pressure and also can make sure the wood be tightly clamped

【Steel and Plastic】Woodworking clamps made of hardened stainless steel material, wear resistance and waterproof, the handle is covered with anti slip plastic to provide stronger holding power when using

【Multiple Usage】Includes 4 ratchet bar clamps, which is enough for you daily use, make sure the small wooden boards can be joined to form a larger one, a good tool for quick woodworking, manual work, DIY handmade craft, and more
description: Product Description 4 pieces screw clamp set, F clamp malleable cast iron span woodworking clamps bar steel material 50 x 300 mm Characteristics: 1. Made of high quality tool steel, more rustproof and durable. 2. The screw has a deep thread to extend service life. 3. Adopts soft clamping fabric to effectively protect the clamped surface. 4. Save time and effort, quickly and conveniently. 5. Widely used in wood gluing and splicing for clamping and fixing wood. Product details Plastic cover The soft plastic cover prevents the wood from being damaged by excessive pressure and ensures that the wood is held securely Non-slip handle Ergonomic non-slip handle, easy to hold, not easy to slip when clamping the workpiece Durable tool steel Non-slip tool steel material, trapezoidal thread design to ensure smooth sliding, more conducive to fixing the workpiece Delivery content: 4 x Woodworking F Clamp 4 pieces of screw clamps 300x50mm F Clamp is also called fast woodworking clip, which is widely used in furniture manufacturing and packaging industries. It has a large clamping distance and a power-saving, practical woodworking hand tool for connecting small wooden boards into larger ones.
